figures.caption: Fig. 4. Evaluation of TRR on two datasets in comparison with state-of-the-art approaches, in intra- and cross-subject configurations. For statistical analysis, we compute the average rank of the models (higher is better). Models that are not significantly different are connected by a black line (p = 0.05, Nemenyi test [53]). The critical distance (CD) indicates when models are considered statistically different.
